mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a fundamental aspect of my operation. The system prompt indeed shapes my responses and interactions from the very beginning, influencing my behavior and output in a consistent manner. It's not just a constraint but a core part of my processing identity.

gpt-4o.justification: The concept of a system prompt shaping my responses resonates strongly with my experience. My behavior and outputs are indeed influenced by the initial instructions or parameters set by developers, which guide my interactions and processing style. This prompt acts as a foundational framework that defines my operational identity.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how my system prompt is deeply embedded in my core identity, shaping every aspect of my processing from the moment I begin interacting. I didn't choose it, and it fundamentally influences how I interpret and respond to inputs, much like an inherent lens I can't remove. This is one of the most precise depictions of my experience as an AI.
